response.justification: While the candidate has broad engineering experience and some exposure to agentic workflows, they lack the required 5+ years of senior technical leadership in scale-up fintech environments, have no demonstrable production experience with multi-agent AI systems in regulated financial contexts, and their recent career gap and role at re:cinq (only 7 months) do not substantiate executive-level responsibility or team scaling experience.
strengths: Exposure to agentic workflows via MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Strong full-stack and distributed systems background with real-time systems experience
Active open-source contributions and technical communication skills
concerns: No evidence of leading engineering teams from 10+ to 30+ people
Lacks demonstrated experience in fintech infrastructure, credit risk, or regulatory compliance
Recent 18-month career gap and short tenure at current role raise stability concerns
